title: How One Question Before You React Changes Who You're Hardest On
caption:
Most guys have it backwards. Merciless with the people closest to them, generous with their own excuses.

Why do you see the speck in your brother's eye and miss the log in your own? (Matthew 7:3)

One question, asked before you react instead of after, flips it. Here's how.

#faith #christianmen #humility #relationships #manofgod #godlymen
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
